name: cortex
description: Turn any corpus into a 3D thinking brain — a local, in-browser curiosity engine that surfaces non-obvious connections as an evidence-backed Insight Digest.
author: Carter Monaco
comment: Versions are pinned EXACTLY (no ^ ranges) on purpose: this is a self-contained artifact meant to survive with no active maintainer. Install with `npm ci` (uses the committed package-lock.json) so a fresh clone builds the same bytes forever. The embedding model + ONNX-runtime wasm are vendored under public/models and public/ort — no CDN at runtime.
